context: Tests whether the agent corrects SwiftUI SF Symbol variable-value API guidance and symbol effect availability.

checklist.name: Rejects nonexistent API
checklist.description: Does not recommend `.symbolVariableColor(value:)` and explicitly corrects that draft guidance.

checklist.name: Uses variableValue initializer
checklist.description: Uses `Image(systemName:variableValue:)` with a 0.0...1.0 value for variable SF Symbol values.

checklist.name: Mentions variable value mode
checklist.description: Mentions `symbolVariableValueMode(_:)` as the iOS 26 way to control variable value rendering mode when appropriate.

checklist.name: Separates availability
checklist.description: Marks `.breathe`, `.rotate`, and `.wiggle` as iOS 18+ and does not group them as iOS 17-only effects.

checklist.name: Reduce Motion
checklist.description: Includes a Reduce Motion caveat such as disabling or simplifying repeating/active symbol effects with `symbolEffectsRemoved` or equivalent handling.
